data.content: Implementation review approved. Diff is minimal (net -113 lines), changes are localised to src/app/beats/, and the new populateFromCapsules is a pure rename with no normalisation. Acceptance criteria all green: (1) to-active-agent-info.ts deleted, no longer calls normalizeAgentIdentity; (2) useAgentInfoMap reads canonical keys directly; (3) grep -rn 'normalizeAgentIdentity|normalize.*Model' src/app/ returns zero hits; (4) test file retired since the helper is deleted; (5) all four quality gates green (lint, tsc, 3122 tests, build). Ready for shipment.
